precaution_text: Avoid prolonged screen time and stay hydrated.
Rest in a quiet environment and manage stress levels.
Seek immediate medical care if headache is sudden or severe.
Drink plenty of fluids and monitor body temperature.
Avoid crowded places and ensure adequate rest.
Seek urgent medical attention if fever is very high or persistent.
Avoid cold air and stay hydrated.
Cover your mouth when coughing and avoid irritants.
Consult a doctor if cough is accompanied by chest pain or blood.
Eat light meals and avoid spicy foods.
Avoid heavy meals and monitor pain progression.
Seek immediate medical help if pain is severe or worsening.
